questions.question: What sports movie set in Philadelphia won the Best Picture Academy Award in 1976?
Long before Mario, there was Pong which had to be played on this classic home console, released in 1975.
Name two of the four friends who reminded us "That's What Friends Are For" in 1985, to raise money for AIDS research.
questions.answer: Dionne Warwick, Elton John, Gladys Knight, Stevie Wonder
